Two products

Recurring perks or one-off events.

Recurring

Gaviom Perks

$6 / employee / month

Like meal vouchers, but for winning.

Monthly private draw for every enrolled employee. HR configures prize pool once. Payroll receives 1099-ready winner exports.

  • ✓Auto-enrollment via HRIS or CSV
  • ✓Published odds and capped entries per employee
  • ✓Live draw on YouTube, employee-only link
Book a demo
One-off

Gaviom Events

$2,400 / draw

Kickoff, launch, anniversary, sales SPIFF.

Single private sweepstakes for a defined audience. Custom branding, prize selection, and comms templates included.

  • ✓Up to 2,500 eligible employees per draw
  • ✓Launch in ~5 business days from signed order
  • ✓Post-draw winner packet for payroll and comms

CS renewal

How it works

Live in about one week.

From intro call to first draw, most teams ship in 5–7 business days.

01

Intro

30-minute discovery with a senior rep. Scope audience, prize budget, and compliance needs.

02

Setup

HRIS sync or CSV upload. MSA signed. Sandbox with your branding in 48 hours.

03

Launch

Employee comms kit sent. Entries open on a private subdomain. Odds published internally.

04

Draw

Live verifiable RNG. Winner verified same night. Payroll packet within 48 hours.

Pricing

Transparent per-employee pricing.

Gaviom Events billed per draw. Gaviom Perks billed monthly on enrolled headcount.

Perks only · up to 200 employees

  • ✓1 monthly private draw
  • ✓Standard prize catalog
  • ✓Email support · 4h SLA

Procurement-ready

What your legal and HR teams ask for, upfront.

SOC 2 Type II

Report available under NDA. Annual penetration test. Sub-processor list maintained.

Request SOC 2 →

1099-MISC payroll-ready

Winner exports with TIN collection workflow. Tax-coded as a non-cash benefit where applicable.

Payroll packet sample →

Verifiable RNG

Public seed, audit log, and replay instructions published after every draw.

Draw methodology →

Bonded · 47 states

Alternate method of entry for employees. Official rules reviewed per jurisdiction.

State coverage →

Placeholder disclosures · validate with counsel before procurement submission

FAQ

B2B questions, straight answers.

Is this legal as an employee benefit?
Private sweepstakes for enrolled employees are structured as promotional contests with AMOE, not gambling. Tax treatment varies. We provide payroll documentation; your counsel confirms benefit classification.
Do employees pay to enter?
No. Employer funds entry. Employees may use free alternate method of entry where required by state rules.
Can we use custom prizes?
Yes on Growth and Enterprise. Starter uses our standard catalog (cash, travel credits, electronics).
How is pricing quoted for multi-entity companies?
Enterprise pricing is per legal entity and headcount band. We deliver a written quote by end of week 1, not a generic rate card.
What HRIS integrations exist?
Workday and Rippling on Growth+. Others via SCIM or scheduled CSV on Enterprise.
Who owns employee data?
You do. Gaviom is processor under our DPA. Data deleted 90 days after contract end unless legally required to retain.
Can we run a public consumer sweepstakes too?
Yes. Business and consumer products are separate contracts and subdomains. See the consumer site →

Ready for your first private draw?

Book a demo. Senior rep, live sandbox in 48h, pricing in writing by end of week 1.
